name: PlayStation 2
description: Sony's 128-bit home console platform, with one of the largest game libraries ever and strong support across action, RPG, racing, horror, and licensed games.

eras.title: DVD Breakthrough Era
eras.description: Early period where DVD playback, major third-party games, and Sony's first-party studios establish PS2 dominance.

eras.title: Peak Library Era
eras.description: The platform's strongest period, with major sequels, genre-defining action games, RPGs, horror, racing, and open-world releases.

eras.title: Long Tail Era
eras.description: Late releases and budget support continue long after the PlayStation 3 launch.
